---
title: "Frances Hariott Wood"
---

## Frances Hariott Wood

**Dates:** (d.1930)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874)

### Biography

The <i>Literary Year Book</i> (1901), 239, lists \'WOOD, MISS FRANCES HARIOTT, Elmwood, 116 Bromley Road, Beckenham, Kent.\'  She published both fiction and plays between the 1870s and 1920s.

### Letters

- Letter from July 3d [1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
